# Elvin Lopez, CFA

Elvin is responsible for MIM’s global private equity program. He chairs the investment committee for alternative investments and is a voting member for the direct debt investment committee. He joined MIM in August 2007 from The State of New Jersey where he co-headed the private equity program. [...] MetLife Investment Management Logo

MetLife Investment Management brings institutional investors deep expertise From multi-asset, equities, and public fixed income to alternatives, private fixed income, and real estate, our clients benefit from specialized capabilities backed by a broader global reach and regionally grounded insights tailored to investor needs.

MetLife Investment Management has a long history of originating private debt.

MetLife Investment Management aims to tailor portfolios that optimally address the needs of a range of institutional clients. With approachable expertise, we are committed to building strong long-term relationships by understanding client risk and return objectives.

Gain actionable insights with whitepapers, articles and reports from our analysts. [...] European Economic Area

If you are a resident of, or are present in, the European Economic Area, you represent and warrant that you are (or are acting on behalf of) a “professional investor” as defined under the Markets in Financial Instruments Directive.

The Information may constitute “marketing” in the EEA as defined in the Alternative Investment Fund Managers Directive (2011/61/EU) (“AIFMD”). The Information is only directed at investors in an EEA jurisdiction where marketing may lawfully take place, including where the manager of the applicable fund is appropriately registered or authorised under AIFMD or where such investors have contacted the manager at their own initiative in jurisdictions where “reverse solicitations” are permitted.

How Elvin is different

## Other AI makes you do work to get your work done.

Build it yourself · Lindy, Zapier

You design the automation step by step, then keep it running.

Elvin writes its own plans from your context.

Prompt it yourself · ChatGPT, Claude

You still have to remember to ask.

Elvin works ahead of you and brings the work to you.

Risky power tools · OpenClaw

Full access to your machine and real security exposure. [...] Full access to your machine and real security exposure.

Elvin is sandboxed, permissioned, and asks before it acts.

Elvin is the one that moves first.

Elvin

## Stop holding it all in your head.

Connect your accounts and let Elvin find the work before you do. [...] Three things before your 9am.

1. 01 Alice needs a yes on the Q3 scope cut before standup.
2. 02 The Sutter invoice dispute has to start today. Draft ready.
3. 03 Your 2pm with Amanda moved to 2:30, room 4B.

3:14

Brain dump · between meetings

Call the contractor backSend Marcus the deckBook the offsite flights

Where Elvin lives

## Elvin is wherever you are, not just at your desk.

Elvin is not a website you log into and leave. It lives in five places: the web, the iPhone and Android apps, and right inside Telegram and your texts. Telegram and SMS are not integrations, they are Elvin. Message it the way you would a coworker, kick off a task, or get your briefing back, all in the same thread.

results.title: About - Elvin
results.content:
Elvin

Sign up

About Elvin

# Automate the boring.

Elvin is proactive AI for professionals drowning in coordination work. It watches the context you're already generating, suggests the next move, and handles the work when you say yes.

## What we're building

Elvin is a technology startup building proprietary AI software that helps professionals manage the complexity of modern work. Our product keeps your to-do list, inbox, and calendar moving forward with less manual effort and less cognitive load. Elvin is currently in private beta.

## Our team

Elvin was founded by two technologists who have spent their careers building platforms that turn complexity into leverage.

Co-founder and CEO

### Ellie Powers

results.title: Elvin - LinkedIn
results.content: have enough context about what you’re trying to do, it can start to be truly useful without more time investment from you. (Maybe the opposite of OpenClaw!) When we started Elvin, AI was already intelligent. What’s missing was initiative. That's what we're building at Elvin. www.tryelvin.com [Likes: 13, Comments: 1]; Ellie Powers (1w): Did you star OpenClaw, read the install steps, then close the tab? Me too. That's the audience for this demo: people who know they can get more out of AI but want to find the right setup that doesn’t create more work or open up a ton of security holes. Proactive AI that can get real work done is reality now. We think Elvin is the fastest way to get the results you want. Elvin does a lot of what OpenClaw does. It just doesn't require a software developer to [...] figures out what needs to happen, creates Linear tickets with context already attached, and hands them off to Devin to build. By the time I get off the highway, Devin (from Cognition ) is already working. You do not need OpenClaw for this. You do not need a VPS, Docker containers, or a weekend to set it up. Highway 280 has never been more productive. Scott Wu thanks for making Devin make my commute more productive! #AI #Openclaw Try it on your own car at - tryelvin.com [Likes: 112, Comments: 26]; Ellie Powers (1mo): Last year I was at the CPO Summit as a CPO. Next week I'll be back as a founder. With so many shifts in our industry from the power of AI tools to code and design to the rise of the "product builder" it felt like the right time to dive into building a product I've always
